$comment: Azure Front Door rules-engine template for AzureFrontDoorCdnSigner verification. Import this into your AFD profile's rules engine and set the EMBEDPDF_CDN_SECRET environment variable on the rule. The rule reads ?token= and ?expires= query params, recomputes HMAC-SHA256(secret + path + expires), and rejects on mismatch or expiry. Server-side signer must use the same algorithm — see AzureFrontDoorCdnSigner.ts.
name: embedpdf-cdn-token-verify

actions.name: rules_engine_action
actions.$comment: Pseudocode — AFD's rules-engine syntax varies. Concrete implementation depends on whether you use AFD Standard, Premium, or Classic. See README in this directory for vendor-specific config snippets.
